Research2.description:
Gain +1 Tech.
Bonus Passive: Crafting subtracts 1 Tech instead of all of it.

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description: Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit.

Discharge2.description: Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit with a 10% Stun chance for each point of mana spent.

Repair.name: Repair
Repair.description: Repair 1 use to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.

Repair2.description: Repair all uses to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.

ShoddyJetpack.name: Shoddy Jetpack
ShoddyJetpack.description: Fly to a random tile in a large area. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

ShoddyJetpack2.description: Fly to any tile. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

SpawnDecoy.name: Spawn Decoy
SpawnDecoy.description: Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies.

SpawnDecoy2.description: Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies. When an enemy targets you, swap places with the decoy.

Switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
Switcheroo.description: Your next attack breaks your weapon, then craft a new one.

Switcheroo2.description: Your next attack breaks your weapon, then gain +1 Tech and craft a weapon.

Flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
Flamethrower.description: Shoot a flame that inflicts Burn.

AutoPilot.name: Autopilot
AutoPilot.description: Take an extra turn after this one. You are AI controlled on that turn.

AutoPilot2.description:
You or another unit takes an extra turn after this one. That unit is AI controlled on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Recycle.name: Recycle
Recycle.description: Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.

Recycle2.description: Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action. This spell costs 1 mana if you haven't used your weapon this turn.

RocketSkates.name: Rocket Skates
RocketSkates.description: Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an area (including to yourself).

RocketSkates2.description: Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an larger area (including to yourself).

RocketSkates_Bombchu.name: Bombchu Dash
RocketSkates_Bombchu.description: Dash forward in a straight line then explode.

DrillDown.name: Drill Down
DrillDown.description: Dig to an open tile in a straight line.

DrillDown2.description: Dig to a tile in a straight line. If you dig into a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

ArmorUp.name: Armor Up
ArmorUp.description: Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your empty armor slots.

ArmorUp2.description: Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your or an adjacent unit's empty armor slots.

FreshOffTheForge2.description: Give +7 [img:shield] and Burn 3 to yourself or an adjacent unit.

ElectricNail.name: Electric Nail
ElectricNail.description: Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.

ElectricNail2.description:
Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Craft.name: Craft
Craft.description: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon.

Craft2.description: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon for yourself or an ally in range 3 (if they have an empty weapon slot).

Shockwave.name: Shockwave
Shockwave.description: Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.

Shockwave2.description:
Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.
[s:.7](Deals more damage to closer units and less damage to further units.)[/s]

Math.name: Math!
Math.description: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value.

Math2.description: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, gain 5 mana.

Reprogram.name: Reprogram
Reprogram.description: Conjure a random spell of your class as a bonus ability.

Reprogram2.description: Conjure a random upgraded spell of your class as a bonus ability.

Improve2.description: You or an adjacent unit gain +1 to 2 random stats.

Catbot.name: Catbot
Catbot.description:
Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

Catbot2.description:
Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon. Gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

Bombchu2.description:
Spawn a Bombchu bot in range 4.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RemoteDetonator.name: Remote Detonator
RemoteDetonator.description: Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.

RemoteDetonator2.description:
Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ShortCircuit.name: Short Circuit
ShortCircuit.description: Deal 1 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 3) to all adjacent units.

ShortCircuit2.description: Deal 2 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 10) to all adjacent units.

Electrolyze2.description:
Give your weapon +3 electric damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

EjectButton.name: Eject Button
EjectButton.description: Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.

EjectButton2.description:
Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Firecrackers.name: Firecracker
Firecrackers.description: Throw 3 small 1-damage explosives at random tiles in an area.

Firecrackers2.description: Throw small 1-damage explosives at all tiles in an area.

Upgrade.name: Upgrade
Upgrade.description: Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up.

Upgrade2.description: Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield].

Eureka.name: Eureka!
Eureka.description:
Gain +3 Tech and Madness 1.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

Eureka2.name: Eureka!
Eureka2.description:
Gain +3 Tech.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

PunchBot2.description: Spawn a Rubber Fist Bot within a large range.

FastHands.name: Fast Hands
FastHands.description: Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana).

FastHands2.description: Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana). Repair 1 use to all of your equipment.

MechSuitEject.name: Eject!
MechSuitEject.description: Launch yourself out of the mech. Deal damage to units you land on and yourself.

MechSuitDash.name: Thrusters
MechSuitDash.description: Dash forward and light fires in your path.

MechSuit.name: Mech Suit
MechSuit.description:
Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

MechSuit2.description:
Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

UnreliableShield.name: Unreliable Shield Generator
UnreliableShield.description: Gain +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

UnreliableShield2.description:
Get +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

UnreliableMissile.name: Unreliable Missile Launcher
UnreliableMissile.description: Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

UnreliableMissile2.description:
Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

SpareParts.name: Spare Parts
SpareParts.description: Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +2 [img:shield], +4 Charge, +1 Thorns, or 1 coin.

SpareParts2.description: Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +4 [img:shield], +8 Charge, +2 Thorns, or 2 coins.

BatteryNuke.name: Split the Atom
BatteryNuke.description:
Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

BatteryNuke2.description:
Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
This spell absorbs the mana you spend casting other spells.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

ExperimentalTeleporter.name: Experimental Teleporter
ExperimentalTeleporter.description: Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.

ExperimentalTeleporter2.description:
Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ShockTherapy.name: Shock Therapy
ShockTherapy.description: Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or an adjacent unit. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.

ShockTherapy2.description: Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or a unit in range 5. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.

BuildNuke.name: Build Nuke
BuildNuke.description: Spawn a mini-nuke that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.

BuildNuke2.description: Spawn a mini-nuke in range 4 that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.

InstantBarrier.name: Instant Barrier
InstantBarrier.description:
Gain +6 [img:shield].
Castable only if you have no [img:shield].

InstantBarrier2.description:
Gain +6 [img:shield].
This spell's mana cost is equal to your current [img:shield].

VoltTackle.name: Volt Tackle
VoltTackle.description: Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them.

VoltTackle2.description: Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them with a 50% chance to inflict Stun.

Smash.name: Smash
Smash.description: Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.

Smash2.description:
Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ShedScrap2.description: Lose 1 [img:shield]. Spawn a junk pile in range 2.

RepairArmor.name: Repair Armor
RepairArmor.description: Lose all [img:shield], then gain [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield].

RepairArmor2.name: Repair Armor
RepairArmor2.description: Lose all [img:shield], then give [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield] to yourself or another ally.

RocketRide.name: Rocket Ride
RocketRide.description: Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)

RocketRide2.description:
Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RoboVac.name: Robo-Vac
RoboVac.description: Spawn a vacuum bot that collects pickups and shares their effects with you.

RoboVac2.description: Spawn a vacuum bot that collects pickups and shares their effects with your whole team.

NurseBot.name: Nurse Bot
NurseBot.description: Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.

NurseBot2.description:
Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

TeslaCoil.name: Tesla Coil
TeslaCoil.description: Spawn a tesla coil that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.

TeslaCoil2.description: Spawn a tesla coil in range 7 that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.

RefineMaterials.name: Refine Materials
RefineMaterials.description: Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech.

RefineMaterials2.description: Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech, +1 [img:shield], and +1 to a random stat.

Fabricate.name: Fabricate
Fabricate.description: Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.

Fabricate2.description:
Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Sparks.name: Sparks
Sparks.description: Shoot electric bolts at up to 3 random enemies or robots.

Sparks2.description: Shoot electric bolts at up to 5 random enemies or robots.

Hone.name: Hone
Hone.description: Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle.

Hone2.description: Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle. Refresh your weapon action.
